GRANT PURSUANT TO THE PARTIES' STIPULATION. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. calendar.matters:
MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar May-20-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PETITIONER PARALLAX VOLATILITY ADVISERS, LP, DANIEL HUTCHISON, JILL ARMSTRONG AND WILL BARTLETT's MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.

No apperances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Grant pursuant to the parties' stipulation.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
